ham.subject: Scheduled Maintenance Notice – Backup Service – March 10, 2026
ham.body:
Hello Team,

This is a reminder that the backup service for our shared drives will undergo scheduled maintenance on March 10, 2026 from 02:00 AM to 04:00 AM GMT. During this window, access to all backups will be unavailable. Please ensure that you have locally saved any critical data that you might need before the maintenance period.

If you experience any anomalies after 04:30 AM, kindly open a ticket in the IT Service Portal. 

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
Cloud Services Team

spam.subject: Immediate Action Required: Unauthorized Access Detected on Your Cloud Account
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

Our security monitoring system has identified unusual activity from an unrecognized device on your CloudServices account. To protect your data, we have temporarily restricted access to all services.

You must verify your identity within the next 24 hours to restore full access. Failure to do so will result in permanent suspension of your account.

Click here to confirm your account ownership: <URL>

Regards,
Account Protection Team
